items.title: Who is pushing for late England World Cup call-up?
items.summary: With Thomas Tuchel naming his England squad for the World Cup on Friday, which players have made late pushes to be included?
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Rodrigo De Paul Reveals Lionel Messi's Training Routine For Upcoming World Cup
items.summary: Lionel Messi might be entering the twilight of his legendary career, but the Inter Miami superstar has no intention of slowing down ahead of the 2026 World Cup.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Parag: 'If we keep playing like this, we shouldn't be in contention for top four'
items.summary: Rajasthan Royals suffered their third successive defeat, and find themselves sixth with two games left
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
